meaning: n.(英国苏塞克斯郡境内)古德伍德公园附近举行的赛马会
examples: The name of the gentleman was Caspar Goodwood; he was a straight young man from Boston.
“Short sleeves should never be worn unless you're on safari,” says the Earl of March, of Goodwood fame.
“Short sleeves should never be worn unless you're on safari, ” says the Earl of March, of Goodwood fame.
Quinn's 26 winners at Glorious Goodwood include victory in last year's Goodwood Cup aboard Persian Punch.
Last year the Goodwood, England-based company sold 3, 538 cars sold worldwide, up 31 percent over 2010.
